Product Page

The Product Page gives shoppers the full product details before they buy. It shows the image gallery, price, options, stock, quantity, buttons, description, extra information, reviews, and related products.

Supported product types

The theme supports standard Magento product types:

Product typeExample use
Simple ProductOne product with no choices, such as one ring or one bracelet.
Configurable ProductA product with choices, such as metal color and ring size.
Bundle ProductA set where shoppers choose items, such as a bridal jewellery set.
Grouped ProductA collection of related products sold together or shown together.
Downloadable ProductA digital item, such as a jewellery care guide PDF.
Virtual ProductA service, plan, warranty, or digital certificate.

What shoppers see

AreaWhat it does
Image galleryShows product images. Shoppers can open image zoom.
Mobile image swipeLets mobile shoppers swipe product images.
Product nameShows the full product name.
PriceShows regular price and sale price when a discount is active.
Short descriptionShows quick product details near the top.
Stock messageShows In Stock, Out of Stock, or low stock message.
Product optionsShows choices like metal color, ring size, bundle items, or downloadable links.
QuantityLets shoppers increase or decrease quantity where the product type needs it.
Add to CartAdds the product to the cart.
Buy NowSends the shopper straight to checkout after adding the item.
WishlistAdds the product to wishlist.
CompareAdds the product to compare.
ShareLets shoppers share or copy the product link.
DescriptionShows full product details.
Additional InformationShows product attributes.
ReviewsShows reviews and the review form.
Related ProductsShows similar products.
Upsell ProductsShows other products shoppers may like.

Product options

Different product types show different options.

Product typeWhat to check
ConfigurableCheck each option, such as metal color and ring size. Price can change after choosing an option.
BundleCheck each bundle choice, quantity, summary, and final price.
GroupedCheck the grouped item list and stock.
DownloadableCheck the file link or sample link.
VirtualCheck service details, price, quantity, and Add to Cart.

Reviews

The product page includes:

  • Rating stars
  • Review count
  • Reviews tab
  • Write a Review form
  • Nickname, summary, and review fields

If reviews do not show, check that reviews are enabled in Magento and approved in Admin.

How to check a product page

  1. Open a product from a category page or search page.
  2. Check product images and image zoom.
  3. Check price, sale price, and stock message.
  4. Select all required options.
  5. Change the quantity if the page shows a quantity field.
  6. Click Add to Cart.
  7. Test Buy Now.
  8. Test Wishlist, Compare, and Share.
  9. Open Description, Additional Information, and Reviews.
  10. Check Related Products and Upsell Products.
  11. Repeat this for each product type used in your store.

Good practice

  • Use clear product names.
  • Add more than one product image when possible.
  • Add jewellery attributes like material, metal color, stone, size, purity, and certification.
  • Keep the short description easy to read.
  • Add related and upsell products for better shopping flow.
